{"prepaidCardName_EN":"Chinese Mainland & Hong Kong & Macau 365-Day Data SIM (36GB+9GB)","realPrice":211,"oriPrice":368,"stockNum":1256,"productDetailHTML_EN":" Title
Basic information
Real-Name Registration The Telecommunications (Registration of SIM Cards) Regulation (“Regulation”) came into effect on 1st September 2021. Pursuant to the Regulation, prepaid SIM cards that can be used in Hong Kong must complete Real-Name Registration in order to activate or continue the use of telecommunications service from 1 March 2022. Insert the physical SIM card into your mobile phone or download and install the eSIM to your mobile phone to complete the Real-Name Registration and then activate the service. Register Here.
Fair use of data It provides 4G/5G network mobile data service, 45GB in Chinese Mainland & Hong Kong & Macau.
Data validity period 365-Day. The SIM card will be expired on the 365th day at 23:59 Hong Kong time since card activation.
Validity period The prepaid card is valid for 1 year from the date of purchase. It will be invaild after expiry.
Coverage area Chinese Mainland, Hong Kong, Macau
Whether add value Customer can recharge the SIM card for service resumption in 365 days after the data is used up or the validity period expires
Re-charge amount: HK$250
Data package: 36GB Chinese Mainland & Hong Kong & Macau Data
Validity period: 365 Days
Note:
(1) Once the 365-day validity period expires or all data has been consumed, data service will be suspended. Unused data will be forfeited. To continue to use the service, customer has to recharge the SIM card within 30 days after the data is used up or the validity period expires. Otherwise, the SIM card will no longer be valid.
(2) Customer can recharge HK$250 to the SIM card so as to reactivate data package(365-day validity period) within 30 days after all data has been consumed or validity period expires.
(3) The usage of reactivated data package will be recalculated from the data of reactivation, and will not be accumulated with the expired unused usage.
Enable the location Chinese Mainland, Hong Kong, Macau
SIM type Nano、Micro、 Normal All-in-one SIM
User Guide Click to view
eSIM Click to view
","infoItems_EN":[{"label":"Real-Name Registration","value":"The Telecommunications (Registration of SIM Cards) Regulation (“Regulation”) came into effect on 1st September 2021. Pursuant to the Regulation, prepaid SIM cards that can be used in Hong Kong must complete Real-Name Registration in order to activate or continue the use of telecommunications service from 1 March 2022. Insert the physical SIM card into your mobile phone or download and install the eSIM to your mobile phone to complete the Real-Name Registration and then activate the service. Register Here."},{"label":"Fair use of data","value":"It provides 4G/5G network mobile data service, 45GB in Chinese Mainland & Hong Kong & Macau."},{"label":"Data validity period","value":"365-Day. The SIM card will be expired on the 365th day at 23:59 Hong Kong time since card activation."},{"label":"Validity period","value":"The prepaid card is valid for 1 year from the date of purchase. It will be invaild after expiry."},{"label":"Coverage area","value":"Chinese Mainland, Hong Kong, Macau"},{"label":"Whether add value","value":"Customer can recharge the SIM card for service resumption in 365 days after the data is used up or the validity period expires Re-charge amount: HK$250 Data package: 36GB Chinese Mainland & Hong Kong & Macau Data Validity period: 365 Days Note: (1) Once the 365-day validity period expires or all data has been consumed, data service will be suspended. Unused data will be forfeited. To continue to use the service, customer has to recharge the SIM card within 30 days after the data is used up or the validity period expires. Otherwise, the SIM card will no longer be valid. (2) Customer can recharge HK$250 to the SIM card so as to reactivate data package(365-day validity period) within 30 days after all data has been consumed or validity period expires. (3) The usage of reactivated data package will be recalculated from the data of reactivation, and will not be accumulated with the expired unused usage."},{"label":"Enable the location","value":"Chinese Mainland, Hong Kong, Macau"},{"label":"SIM type","value":"Nano、Micro、 Normal All-in-one SIM"},{"label":"User Guide","value":"Click to view"},{"label":"eSIM","value":"Click to view"}],"image_EN":"https://www.cuniq.com/pc-static/prepaid-cards/20260420/HKMCChina-365-eng.jpg"}

Basic Information

{"prepaidCardName_EN":"Hong Kong & Macau 4-Day Data SIM (Daily 2GB)","realPrice":25,"oriPrice":66,"stockNum":285,"productDetailHTML_EN":" Title
Basic information
Real-Name Registration Once inserted into the mobile device, the SIM will be activated; For eSIM, scan the activation QR code. The validity period of the SIM card service starts from the day it is activated and the service is commenced. The Telecommunications (Registration of SIM Cards) Regulation (“Regulation”) came into effect on 1st September 2021. Pursuant to the Regulation, prepaid SIM cards that can be used in Hong Kong must complete registration in order to activate or continue the use of telecommunications service from 1 March 2022. Register Here.
Fair use of data It provides 5G/4G network unlimited data usage in Hong Kong and Macau (Once your daily data usage in Hong Kong and Macau reaches “Fair Usage Level (FUP)” 2GB(calculation of data usage will be re-started from HK time 00:00 next day), the upload/download speed would be reduced and controlled at 512kbps and tethering and Peer-to-Peer services would not be available.
Data validity period 4-Day. The SIM card will be expired on the 4th day at 23:59 Hong Kong time since card activation.
Validity period The prepaid card is valid for 1 year from the date of purchase. It will be invaild after expiry.
Coverage area Hong Kong, Macau
Voice/SMS N/A
Whether add value This SIM card is non-rechargeable
Enable the location Hong Kong, Macau
SIM type Nano、Micro、 Normal All-in-one SIM
User Guide Click to view

{"prepaidCardName_EN":"Saudi Arabia, Egypt & Turkey 30-Day Data SIM (6GB)","realPrice":96,"oriPrice":298,"stockNum":312,"productDetailHTML_EN":" Title
Basic information
Fair useuse of data The SIM card provides 4G network mobile data service. Once your total data usage reach "Fair Usage Level (FUP)" 6GB, the upload/download speed would be reduced and restricted(minimum 512kbps) and tethering and Peer-to-Peer services would not be available.
Data validity period 30-Day. Every 24 hours from the activation time is counted as one day, and any less than one hour is also counted as one hour, and is calculated in Hong Kong time.
Validity period The prepaid card is valid for 1 year from the date of purchase. It will be invaild after expiry.
Coverage area Saudi Arabia, Egypt & Turkey
Whether add value This SIM card is non-rechargeable
Last activation date Please refer to the back of the packing
Enable the location Saudi Arabia, Egypt & Turkey. Insert the SIM card into the mobile phone and the mobile network signal will be detected. This means the SIM card has been activated automatically and the service has been commenced. The validity period of the SIM card service starts from the day of activation and service commencement.
SIM type Nano、Micro、 Normal All-in-one SIM
